title: Add M4 Chronicle evidence owner stores
summary: Add structured Chronicle case files, evidence facts, hypotheses, contradictions, confirmed-rule gates, dissemination and evidence reason traces.
acceptance: Chronicle case file and evidence stores own observations testimony traces sources hypotheses contradictions confirmed rules dissemination scope and version history
Evidence support tiers are deterministic structured facts and not hidden probability truth UI prose or presentation-only state
Confirmed rules require configured support independent evidence classes and no fatal unresolved contradiction
Residents can act automatically only on known confirmed rules or explicit temporary policies carried by owner state
Focused tests cover evidence validation support-tier determinism contradiction handling dissemination dirty keys structured reasons and bounded candidate reads

history.details: Created by WM-0061 M4 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Implemented authoritative M4 Chronicle evidence owner stores, deterministic support gates, dissemination dirty keys, resident action checks, focused tests, docs and report; required checks and pnpm quality pass.

changes_requested: Blocking: owner mutators publish state before Chronicle version recording succeeds, leaving ok:false with active case/evidence/knowledge rows; evidence and contradiction validation allows cross-case source/hypothesis/evidence contamination; resolveContradiction and confirmRuleFromHypothesis accept invalid ticks when no recorder is supplied. Checks pass mechanically.

Repaired WM-0063 review blockers: owner mutations now preflight Chronicle recording before local publish, cross-case evidence/contradictions reject with evidence_case_mismatch, invalid resolve/confirm ticks reject without recorder, added atomic/cross-case/tick tests; required checks and pnpm quality pass.

verified: No blocking findings. Re-reviewed current worktree including untracked WM-0063 source/tests; prior blockers are fixed: failed recorder/local preflight paths do not publish owner rows, dirty keys, support metrics or traces; cross-case evidence/contradictions reject with evidence_case_mismatch; invalid resolve/confirm ticks reject without recorder. Required checks and pnpm quality pass.
Verified by reviewer after repair; required checks and pnpm quality passed on task branch before integration.

objective: Implement the authoritative Chronicle evidence fact surface needed for the first M4 rule-discovery path.
forbiddenPaths: lamp network semantics beyond consuming WM-0062 public surfaces
obligation town-rule anomaly crisis-chain or director implementation
public save format or schema changes
benchmarkImpact: Adds evidence row count support candidate visit dissemination dirty backlog and confirmed-rule counters; baseline updates wait for WM-0070.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before changing evidence ownership, save scope, or public projection contracts.
rollbackModel: Revert Chronicle evidence stores, tests, metrics and docs; preserve WM-0062 lamp behavior and all M0-M3 behavior.
ownerGate: Keep evidence facts structured and versioned
Do not let UI prose or case-board state own evidence
Use bounded candidate reads and deterministic support tiers
Block on public protocol save schema dependency UI authority or M5 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Chronicle evidence ownership and deterministic knowledge propagation are architecture-sensitive simulation work.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Re-reviewed current worktree including untracked WM-0063 source/tests; prior blockers are fixed: failed recorder/local preflight paths do not publish owner rows, dirty keys, support metrics or traces; cross-case evidence/contradictions reject with evidence_case_mismatch; invalid resolve/confirm ticks reject without recorder. Required checks and pnpm quality pass.

integration.summary: Verified by reviewer after repair; required checks and pnpm quality passed on task branch before integration.
